name: indoo
summary: Small, clear, agent-friendly CLI for working with Odoo.
pain: Working with Odoo from the terminal is too ad hoc. Humans and agents need one obvious CLI-first workflow to inspect records, discover field metadata, validate setup, and make safe updates without guessing connection details or relying on Markdown docs.
scope: CLI-first Odoo inspection and update workflow
named profiles with one active profile
out_of_scope: full replacement for Odoo shell access
multiple config locations or layered config resolution
open_questions: Is write-and-show the right long-term mutating primitive, or should write safety become even more central without adding workflow sprawl?
Which additional discovery commands, if any, strengthen the one-obvious-workflow design instead of bloating it?
